name: Beaver Club Banana Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine bananas, sugar, baking soda, and salt in a blender. Blend on high speed for 1 minute.
2. Pour the mixture into a mixing bowl and add eggs one at a time.
3. Add oil, yogurt, and milk to the mixture.
4. Add flour last.
5. Pour batter into loaf pans lined with buttered parchment paper.
6. Place in an oven preheated to 275°F on the center rack.
7. Do not remove until 2 1/2 hours are up.
